title: ipomoea deroinii
intro: Ipomoea deroinii, also known as Purple Back Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea deroinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea deroinii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health issues.
